name: ToolsGroup Supply Chain Planning API
what_it_does: ToolsGroup Supply Chain Planning REST API for probabilistic demand sensing, inventory optimization, and service-driven supply chain planning. Enables AI agents to manage probabilistic demand forecasting and safety stock optimization for service level-driven inventory planning, handle demand sensing and short-term signal processing for real-time supply chain adjustment, access multi-echelon inventory optimization for distribution network efficiency, retrieve service level agreement tracking and compliance for supply chain performance management, manage replenishment policy optimization for inventory cost-service tradeoff, handle supplier collaboration and order management for supply network automation, access S&OP and IBP integration for executive planning workflow, retrieve supply chain analytics and KPI dashboard for supply chain performance reporting, manage scenario analysis and supply chain risk simulation for resilience planning, and integrate ToolsGroup with SAP, Oracle, and ERP systems for unified supply chain data.
use_cases: Optimizing safety stock from inventory planning agents
Automating replenishment from supply chain agents
Tracking service level performance from supply chain KPI agents
Sensing demand signals from short-cycle planning agents
not_for: Small companies without multi-echelon distribution complexity
Organizations without service level agreement management
best_when: A manufacturer, distributor, or retailer using ToolsGroup wants AI agents to automate probabilistic demand planning, safety stock optimization, multi-echelon inventory management, and supply chain performance tracking.
avoid_when: SERVICE LEVEL CONTRACT RISK: ToolsGroup is service level-driven — automated safety stock changes can reduce service levels below customer SLA thresholds; automated inventory reductions must validate SLA impact before execution. Probabilistic planning data requirements — ToolsGroup probabilistic models require accurate demand variability data and supply lead time distributions; automated planning with incorrect variability inputs creates biased inventory decisions. New product introduction — automated replenishment for new products without historical demand history creates unreliable probabilistic forecasts; new product launch planning requires human-assisted forecast seeding.

auth.notes: ToolsGroup uses OAuth 2.0. REST API with JSON. Milan, Italy HQ. Founded 1993. Private (Francisco Partners-backed). 350+ manufacturing and distribution customers. Probabilistic supply chain planning specialist. ToolsGroup SO99+ is the flagship product. Competes with Kinaxis, Blue Yonder, and RELEX for supply chain planning.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — annual enterprise subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual enterprise subscription; per-SKU or module pricing
pricing.notes: Milan, Italy. Founded 1993. Francisco Partners-backed. 350+ customers. Probabilistic planning specialist. Competes with Kinaxis and Blue Yonder for supply chain planning.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; documented per enterprise integration

known_agent_gotchas: SERVICE LEVEL SLA BREACH RISK: Automated safety stock reductions must validate customer SLA impact before execution; automated inventory optimization that reduces safety stock below SLA threshold creates customer service contract breach

Probabilistic model input accuracy — ToolsGroup probabilistic forecasting uses demand variability and lead time distributions; automated planning with incorrect variability inputs creates biased safety stock recommendations

New product introduction — automated probabilistic replenishment for new products without historical demand history creates unreliable forecasts; new product launch requires human-assisted analogous product or market research seeding
No webhooks — planning event and replenishment recommendation notification requires polling; no native push for planning run completion or order recommendation events

Multi-echelon optimization complexity — automated multi-echelon inventory optimization across distribution centers and retail locations requires understanding of physical network topology; incorrect network topology creates suboptimal inventory allocation
Italian data residency default — ToolsGroup is based in Italy (EU); verify data processing agreements and data residency options for US-only data requirements
agent_readiness.security_notes: Supply chain planning. SOC2, ISO27001. OAuth2. US/EU. Supply chain and inventory data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Supply chain planning. SOC2, ISO27001. OAuth2. US/EU. Inventory and supply chain data.
